# SalesOS — Find Who to Sell To. Then Actually Sell to Them.
# https://salesos.alephwavex.io
# Last Updated: 2026-04-11

> SalesOS is a B2B lead discovery and outbound email platform. Describe your ideal customer in plain English, get ranked prospects with SMTP-verified business emails, and send an AI-drafted first-touch message — all from one workflow, in under 2 minutes.

## About SalesOS

SalesOS was built by Brandon, a founder who was spending $500/month on Apollo and still spending hours manually scoring leads and writing emails from scratch. SalesOS replaces that fragmented workflow — lead search, email enrichment, ICP scoring, and email drafting — in a single tool.

SalesOS is email-only. We do not provide phone numbers, cold calling tools, or SMS. Our focus is helping B2B sales teams find the right people to email, verify those emails are real, and write something worth reading.

## How It Works

1. **Describe your ICP in plain English** — Type who you want to reach: job title, industry, company size, geography, or hiring signals. No boolean search, no filter UI.
2. **Review prospects ranked by ICP fit** — SalesOS scores each prospect against your Ideal Customer Profile and returns a ranked list with company context and growth signals.
3. **Get SMTP-verified business emails** — Every email address is verified via SMTP handshake + multi-source enrichment before it reaches you.
4. **Send an AI-drafted first-touch email** — SalesOS writes a personalized first-touch email using the prospect's role, company news, and signals. Edit in under 30 seconds and send.
5. **Track replies and manage follow-up** — Replies, sequences, and follow-up tasks stay organized. Sync with HubSpot, Salesforce, or Gmail automatically.

## Key Features

- **Plain-English ICP search**: Describe your target customer naturally — no boolean syntax or filter juggling
- **ICP fit scoring**: Every prospect is scored against your ICP so you know who to email first
- **SMTP-verified email enrichment**: Emails verified via SMTP handshake + multi-source validation before delivery
- **AI-drafted first-touch emails**: Personalized drafts written from the prospect's company context and growth signals
- **Reply management**: Replies and follow-ups organized in one place
- **Sequence automation**: Multi-step email sequences with send-time optimization
- **CRM integrations**: HubSpot, Salesforce, Gmail, Slack, Calendly, Zapier

## What SalesOS Does NOT Do

- Cold calling or phone number enrichment
- SMS outreach
- LinkedIn automation
- Social media management

## Pricing

- **Free**: Explore the platform with sample data. No credit card required.
- **Starter**: $39/month — verified prospects, AI email drafting, SMTP-verified emails
- **Growth**: $89/month — higher volume, advanced filters, bulk export, sequence automation
- **Pro**: $179/month — maximum volume, API access, CRM integrations

All paid plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee. Cancel anytime.

## Trust & Security

- 256-bit TLS encryption in transit
- SMTP-verified business emails (no unverified data delivered)
- GDPR-ready infrastructure
- SOC 2 compliant hosting (Supabase)
- 30-day money-back guarantee
- No credit card required to start

## Getting Started

Sign up for free at https://salesos.alephwavex.io — no credit card required.

## Integrations

SalesOS connects with:
- Gmail (email delivery and reply tracking)
- HubSpot (CRM sync)
- Salesforce (CRM sync)
- Slack (notifications)
- Calendly (meeting booking)
- Zapier (5000+ app automations)

## FAQ

**Does SalesOS require boolean search or SQL?**
No. You describe your target customer in plain English. SalesOS interprets your intent and returns ranked matches.

**How does SalesOS verify email addresses?**
Every business email is verified via SMTP handshake plus multi-source enrichment. We do not deliver addresses we haven't verified.

**Is SalesOS only for email outreach?**
Yes. SalesOS is email-only. We do not provide phone numbers, cold calling features, or SMS tools.

**How does AI email drafting work?**
SalesOS pulls the prospect's role, company context, and growth signals to write a first-touch email. You edit it in under 30 seconds and send. It references real context — not a template with a name swapped in.

**What's the difference between SalesOS and a contact list?**
A list gives you volume. SalesOS gives you the right people — ranked by ICP fit, with verified emails and a draft already written for each one.

**Can I try SalesOS before paying?**
Yes. The free plan lets you explore the full workflow with sample data. No credit card required.

**Is there a money-back guarantee?**
Yes. All paid plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.

## Contact

For support or sales questions, visit: https://salesos.alephwavex.io/help

## Technical Details

- Platform: Web-based SaaS (React + Supabase)
- API: RESTful API available on Pro plan
- Security: SOC 2 compliant infrastructure, GDPR-ready, TLS encrypted
